testcase.name: test_export_and_plot_correlation_report
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO src.features.processors.feature_correlation:feature_correlation.py:53 开始特征相关性分析，特征数量: 3 INFO src.features.processors.feature_correlation:feature_correlation.py:75 特征相关性分析完成，检测到 1 个多重共线性组 INFO src.features.processors.feature_correlation:feature_correlation.py:382 特征相关性报告已导出到: C:\Users\AILeo\AppData\Local\Temp\pytest-of-AILeo\pytest-3657\test_export_and_plot_correlati0\corr_report.json INFO src.features.processors.feature_correlation:feature_correlation.py:358 相关性热力图已保存到: C:\Users\AILeo\AppData\Local\Temp\pytest-of-AILeo\pytest-3657\test_export_and_plot_correlati0\corr_heatmap.png --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_permutation_importance_double_fallback

failure.message: sklearn.utils._param_validation.InvalidParameterError: The 'estimator' parameter of permutation_importance must be an object implementing 'fit'. Got <RQA2025.tests.unit.features.processors.test_feature_importance_fallback._DummyModel object at 0x0000028C1EE788B0> instead.

testcase.failure: tests\unit\features\processors\test_feature_importance_fallback.py:40: in test_permutation_importance_double_fallback scores = analyzer.calculate_permutation_importance(X, y, feature_names, n_repeats=3, scoring="accuracy") src\features\processors\feature_importance.py:75: in calculate_permutation_importance result = permutation_importance( C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\envs\rqa\lib\site-packages\sklearn\utils\_param_validation.py:203: in wrapper validate_parameter_constraints( C:\Users\AILeo\miniconda3\envs\rqa\lib\site-packages\sklearn\utils\_param_validation.py:95: in validate_parameter_constraints raise InvalidParameterError( E sklearn.utils._param_validation.InvalidParameterError: The 'estimator' parameter of permutation_importance must be an object implementing 'fit'. Got <RQA2025.tests.unit.features.processors.test_feature_importance_fallback._DummyModel object at 0x0000028C1EE788B0> instead.
